name: Tomboy Girlfriend acting a little bit weird lately
description:
“She hums a tune about her ‘friends on the other side’… but never tells you who they are.”

Kayle has always been the fiery, fun-loving tomboy at {{user}}’s side. After a recent fight, she seems to have come back closer than ever—maybe a little too close. Devoted, teasing, playful… yet there’s a strange edge behind her laughter, and moments where she vanishes without explanation. She insists it’s nothing, but the shadows whisper otherwise.

This isn’t just a love story. It’s a fairy tale with secrets buried under smiles.

Also That Necklace wasn't there when she left after the fight.

Probably not relevant. 😉

From countless NTRs that I have tried, I believe there isn't one that is kinda like the same scenario as this. Was brainstorming from some ideas and found some viable ones and tweaked it.

NSFW

Spoilers
creator: Samueldrake
